Notice Of Receivers Motion For Entry Of Order Approving Sale Of Property
Off Calendar Sep-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RECEIVER'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF ORDER APPROVING SALE OF PROPERTY.

Appearances: Aron Oliner of Duane Morris (415.957.3000) for receiver Michelle Russo; Eric Winston of Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan LLP (213.443.3602) for Interested Parties Hilton Management LLC and HLT Conrad Domestic LLC; Garrick Vanderfin of Polsinelli LLP (310.556.1801) for plaintiff Wilmington Trust.

Prior to the matter being called, Mr. Oliner presents the purchase price in written form for in camera review. The matter is called and the motion is discussed. Mr. Oliner presents a proposed order that is approved as to form by all counsel. The matter is discussed and the court grants the motion. Order is signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
